differential_diagnoses: Lymphoma (e.g., thyroid lymphoma or extranodal lymphoma)
next_steps: Obtain serum thyroid stimulating hormone (TSH), free T4, and total T3 levels
Perform dedicated thyroid and neck ultrasound
Consider fine-needle aspiration (FNA) biopsy of the thyroid nodule/area of concern
Check erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) trend
Evaluate for systemic inflammatory or autoimmune markers (ANA, RF, ferritin)
Repeat blood cultures if fevers persist to rule out occult bacteremia
Obtain thyroid function panel (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Perform dedicated thyroid and neck ultrasound with color Doppler flow
Consider radioactive iodine uptake (RAIU) scan, pending thyroid hormone results
Perform fine-needle aspiration (FNA) biopsy if ultrasound shows a suspicious nodule or if symptoms persist
Perform systemic rheumatologic and inflammatory workup (ANA, RF, ferritin, ESR, CRP)
